commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8ef8ca7526865df660a8aa8bf23fb6c1731532cd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a preflight skip for unconfigured interval heartbeats when HEARTBEAT.md is absent and adds a regression test asserting no LLM or outbound send occurs.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a high-confidence source reproduction path: current main enables the default agent heartbeat interval and returns base preflight on missing HEARTBEAT.md, allowing the model-call path to run. I did not execute the test because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer review for the default-behavior compatibility change plus contributor real-behavior proof; there is no safe automated repair path while the proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix: skip default idle heartbeat without HEARTBEAT.md
target.body:
Summary
- Skip default, unconfigured idle heartbeat runs when the agent workspace has no HEARTBEAT.md, no due commitments, and no event wake payload.
- Preserve existing behavior for explicit heartbeat configuration and wake/cron/exec-triggered runs.
- Add a regression test proving the default missing-file idle path does not call the LLM or send outbound messages.

Fixes #85210

Verification
- `corepack pnpm test src/infra/heartbeat-runner.returns-default-unset.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm format:check src/infra/heartbeat-runner.ts src/infra/heartbeat-runner.returns-default-unset.test.ts`

Behavior addressed: default 30m heartbeat should not burn model tokens while idle when the user has not opted into heartbeat instructions and HEARTBEAT.md is absent.
Real environment tested: Windows checkout with repo dependencies installed via Corepack pnpm.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `corepack pnpm test src/infra/heartbeat-runner.returns-default-unset.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: targeted heartbeat test file passed with 40 tests.
Observed result after fix: the new missing HEARTBEAT.md default-idle regression case returns skipped/missing-heartbeat-file and does not call getReplyFromConfig or outbound send.
What was not tested: live gateway idle soak against z.ai/glm-5.1 token usage.
target.author: anonymouszed-beep
